title: All HUD Bars
description: Mod that displays your health, armor, food and other in bars instead of multiple icons
body:
# All HUD Bars

### All HUD Bars replaces the Vanilla rendering of health, armor, food, air, mount health with bars.

If you want a mod that only does the health bar, check out [Simple Health Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-health-bar)

- Supports **Wither, Poison, Freezing** colors for the health bar
- Supports **custom maximum health, absorption and vehicle health**
 
### Current supported versions:

- **Fabric 1.21 - 1.21.7**
